narrative:
Washington Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 532 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
